termination_conditions: non-payment of rent for more than 15 days
material breach of any covenant herein
use of the Premises for any unlawful purpose

auto_renewal.terms: Unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least 30 days prior to the expiration date, this Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms on the same terms and conditions, except that the monthly rent shall increase as provided in Section 5.
